name: memory
description: Cross-platform memory system. 3-tier architecture, vault sync, session hooks, weekly consolidation.

settings.name: Obsidian Vault Path
settings.description: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault

settings.name: OpenClaw Config Path
settings.description: Path to openclaw-config repo for Mode 2 sync

settings.name: Topic Max Entries
settings.description: Max entries per topic file before split alert (default: 50)

settings.name: Dream Schedule
settings.description: Cron expression for weekly dream cycle (default: 0 3 * * 0)
